subcodes.first_line: A praise, exalted above every conception that pen and ink can portray, beseemeth the subline, the ever-blessed court of the Well-Beloved Who hath initiated the people of Baha into the school of adversity
subcodes.first_line_orig: حمد مقدس از قلم و مداد ساحت امنع اقدس حضرت محبوبی را لایق و سزاست که اهل بها
subcodes.subjects: @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @wisdom [hikmat], @rejection, opposition and persecution, @suffering and imprisonment
